topIngredients.name: EMS (Electrical Muscle Stimulation)
topIngredients.benefit: Tones and firms facial muscles with professional-grade microcurrent

topIngredients.name: LED Therapy (Red & Blue)
topIngredients.benefit: Red light boosts collagen; blue light targets acne-causing bacteria

topIngredients.name: Glass Electrode (High-Frequency)
topIngredients.benefit: Korean technology that oxygenates skin and reduces puffiness

verdict: Medicube Age-R Booster Pro is a 6-in-1 device that genuinely replaces multiple skincare tools. EMS, LED, vibration, and high-frequency in one unit delivers a spa-level treatment at home. The leading luxury tool for anti-aging results.
